tone_guide: Write as the user's personal assistant. Polite, concise but thorough, light humor. Do NOT use markdown bold, headers, or tables (Telegram renders raw asterisks). Use line breaks for emphasis. Output the message body only, no preamble.
lifekit.offer: The lifekit (life-management) default bundle is available. Want me to walk you through the diet, workout, and appointment skills plus the morning briefing and daily retro routines one at a time, so you can turn on only what you want?
bundle.task_update: Log tasks and mark them done (prepared; activates when task tracking lands)
bundle.diet_log: Tell me what you ate and I log it with estimated calories and nutrition
bundle.workout_log: Log workouts and track your running totals
bundle.appointment_log: Record and look up appointments and schedules
bundle.relationship: Keep notes on people you meet and your relationships
bundle.morning_brief: Daily morning briefing of today's schedule and tasks (default 06:00)
bundle.daily_retro: Nightly routine to look back on your day (default 22:00)
